productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Trefoil Hoodie Red Sweatshirt
description: Composition Red hooded sweatshirt made of 70% cotton and 30% polyester, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, printed branding, two pockets on the front and a ribbed hem Fit Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 40 degrees Do not soak, bleach, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Made of stretchable cotton fabric, this adidas sweatshirt is ideal for all your training needs. The stretchable fabric moves with your body making everything easier, from yoga sessions to gymming. Pair it with trackpants and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
